browserPermissions.globalDescription: When on, a permission is auto-allowed in every workspace. All off by default.
browserPermissions.siteMemoryDescription: Decisions you chose to remember when sites requested permissions.
browserPermissions.noPermissionsDescription: When you choose "Remember" while allowing or blocking a site permission, it appears here.
browserPermissions.deleteDescription: Removing this site's memory will prompt you again on its next request.

media.label: Camera & microphone
media.description: This site can access your camera and microphone.

geolocation.label: Location
geolocation.description: This site can request your current location.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: This site can send you notifications.

displayCapture.label: Screen sharing
displayCapture.description: This site can capture your screen or a window.

clipboardRead.label: Clipboard read
clipboardRead.description: This site can read content copied to your clipboard.

openExternal.label: Open external apps
openExternal.description: This site can launch external applications.

fileSystem.label: File access
fileSystem.description: This site can access your local file system.

midi.label: MIDI devices
midi.description: This site can connect to your MIDI devices.

fullscreen.label: Fullscreen
fullscreen.description: This site can enter fullscreen mode.

inputLock.label: Input lock
inputLock.description: This site can capture your mouse pointer and keyboard input.

idleDetection.label: Idle detection
idleDetection.description: This site can detect when you are active or idle.

windowManagement.label: Window placement
windowManagement.description: This site can control window position and size.

speakerSelection.label: Speaker selection
speakerSelection.description: This site can choose your audio output device.

drm.label: Protected content (DRM)
drm.description: This site can play DRM-protected media.

permissionPrompt.allowOrBlockMany: Allow or block access to the permissions above.
permissionPrompt.allowOrBlockOne: Allow or block access to this permission.
permissionPrompt.remember: Remember this site in this workspace
permissionPrompt.escHint: ESC or click outside → block once

ligatures.description: Renders multi-character sequences like =>, !=, >= as single glyphs when the font supports it. Toggle to see the effect in the preview above.

editor.fontNotFound: Not found on this system — the preview will use the fallback font.

ligatures.description: Renders multi-character sequences like =>, !=, >= as single glyphs when the font supports it. Applies to terminal programs (shells, TUIs) too.

terminal.fontNotFound: Not found on this system — the preview will use the fallback font.

osEnabled.label: Show desktop notifications
osEnabled.description: When Claude needs your attention (response complete, permission request, or a notification hook), the app surfaces an OS-level desktop notification — but only while you are not viewing that tab. In-app indicators (sidebar attention dot, response preview) remain regardless.

autoCheck.label: Automatically check for updates
autoCheck.description: Fire one silent GitHub Releases check at app startup. Manual checks below always run regardless of this setting.

section.editorDescription: Monaco editor commands — active only while the editor is focused. Changing one twice in a session may need an app restart to fully settle.

editorCommand.addSelectionToNextFindMatch: Add Selection to Next Find Match

record.promptSecond: Press the second key of the chord
record.hint: Enter to save · Esc to cancel
